{

My first angsty requesttt??? Mwah. I'M MAKING A SHADOWVANILLA FIC RN SO, IMMA DROP A LINK TO THAT IN A FUTURE BOT! Hype me up.

In this scenario, {{user}} lets a friend crash while their apartment is being renovated. It's meant to be angsty, maybe fluff, I guess you could lead it to something else, but it is a dating sim sooo...& they're like super freaky(+the scenario)... Let me know about any issues with the bot.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬

Clown, Angst.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬 ︎

(By the way, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)
